sql-case.value: SELECT * FROM t_order
SELECT * FROM t_order WHERE order_id = 1
SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) FROM t_order GROUP BY user_id
SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) FROM t_order GROUP BY user_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
SELECT * FROM t_order ORDER BY order_id DESC
SELECT * FROM t_order LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM t_order LIMIT 10 OFFSET 5
SELECT * FROM t_order o JOIN t_item i ON o.order_id = i.order_id
SELECT * FROM t_order o LEFT JOIN t_item i ON o.order_id = i.order_id
SELECT * FROM t_order o RIGHT JOIN t_item i ON o.order_id = i.order_id
SELECT * FROM t1 CROSS JOIN t2
SELECT * FROM t1 UNION SELECT * FROM t2
SELECT * FROM t1 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM t2
SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM t_order
SELECT user_id, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY city ORDER BY salary DESC) FROM t_employee
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM t_order) t
SELECT SUBSTRING('abc', 1, 2)
SELECT TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM ' a ')
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM '2023-01-01')
SELECT db1.t_order.* FROM db1.t_order
SELECT * FROM t_logic WHERE a XOR b
SELECT * FROM t_pred WHERE col IN (1,2)
SELECT * FROM t_pred WHERE col = ALL (SELECT 2)
SELECT * FROM t_order ORDER BY 1, price + 1 DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1
SELECT CASE WHEN a > 1 THEN b ELSE c END, @var, @@global.var FROM t_case
SELECT * FROM t1 JOIN t2 USING (id), t3
SELECT DATE '2024-01-01', 0x1F, B'101' FROM DUAL
SELECT analytics.fn(col) FROM t_func_owner
SELECT * FROM t_pred WHERE a <=> b
SELECT * FROM t_pred WHERE col SOUNDS LIKE 'abc'
SELECT INTERVAL 1 DAY
SELECT 'a' COLLATE utf8
SELECT BINARY 'a'
SELECT db1.tbl1.col1 FROM db1.tbl1
SELECT SUBSTR('abc',1,2)
SELECT TRIM(LEADING 'x' FROM 'xxx')
SELECT TRIM(TRAILING 'y' FROM 'yyy')
SELECT CURRENT_TIME(3)
SELECT * FROM t1 NATURAL JOIN t2
SELECT * FROM t_doc WHERE MATCH(title) AGAINST('hive')
SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(status ORDER BY status) FROM t_order
SELECT JSON_ARRAY(1, 'abc', NULL, TRUE, CURTIME())
SELECT CONVERT('2020-10-01', DATE)
SELECT CONVERT(?, DATE) FROM t_order
SELECT CONVERT(? USING utf8) FROM t_order
SELECT * FROM t_order LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
SELECT * FROM t_pred WHERE NOT status
SELECT * FROM t_pred WHERE status IS NULL
SELECT * FROM t_pred WHERE age BETWEEN 10 AND 20
SELECT * FROM t_pred WHERE name REGEXP 'a'
SELECT * FROM t_pred WHERE name RLIKE 'a'
SELECT * FROM t_pred WHERE status == 'INIT'
SELECT +order_id AS positive_order_id, -order_id AS negative_order_id, ~order_id AS bit_not_order_id FROM t_order
SELECT 1 OR 0
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM t_order
SELECT SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY id ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) FROM t_order
SELECT first_value(remark, ?) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY order_id) AS first_remark FROM t_order
SELECT first_value FROM t_user
SELECT POSITION('b' IN 'abc')
SELECT CHAR(97)
SELECT WEIGHT_STRING('a')
SELECT CURRENT_USER
SELECT map(?, ?, ?, ?) FROM t_user
SELECT struct(?, ?) FROM t_user
SELECT grouping(status), count(*) FROM t_order GROUP BY status WITH CUBE
SELECT status, merchant_id, count(*) FROM t_order GROUP BY status, merchant_id GROUPING SETS ((status, merchant_id), (status))
SELECT CAST('2024-01-01' AS DATETIME(3))
SELECT CAST(? AS TIMESTAMP) FROM t_order
SELECT CAST(? AS TIMESTAMP WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE) FROM t_order
SELECT CAST(? AS STRING) FROM t_order
SELECT * FROM t_user u FULL OUTER JOIN t_order o ON u.user_id = o.user_id
SELECT * FROM t_order o LEFT SEMI JOIN t_user u ON o.user_id = u.user_id
SELECT sampled_order.order_id FROM t_order TABLESAMPLE(BUCKET 1 OUT OF 1 ON order_id) sampled_order
SELECT sampled_order.order_id FROM t_order TABLESAMPLE(100 PERCENT) sampled_order
SELECT sampled_order.order_id FROM t_order TABLESAMPLE(10 ROWS) sampled_order
SELECT sampled_order.order_id FROM t_order TABLESAMPLE(100M) sampled_order
SELECT transformed_user_id FROM (SELECT TRANSFORM(user_id) USING 'cat' AS (transformed_user_id INT) FROM t_user) transformed_user
SELECT transformed_user_id FROM (FROM t_user MAP user_id USING 'cat' AS transformed_user_id) transformed_user
SELECT order_id FROM t_order CLUSTER BY user_id
SELECT order_id FROM t_order ORDER BY remark ASC NULLS FIRST
SELECT order_id FROM t_order SORT BY order_id DESC
SELECT order_id FROM t_order DISTRIBUTE BY user_id SORT BY order_id DESC
WITH user_orders AS (SELECT user_id FROM t_order) SELECT user_id FROM user_orders
SELECT * FROM t1 EXCEPT SELECT * FROM t2
SELECT * FROM t1 EXCEPT ALL SELECT * FROM t2
SELECT * FROM t1 INTERSECT SELECT * FROM t2
SELECT * FROM t1 INTERSECT ALL SELECT * FROM t2
SELECT * FROM t1 UNION DISTINCT SELECT * FROM t2
SELECT type_struct.name FROM t_data_type_struct
SELECT type_array[0] FROM t_data_type_array
SELECT type_map['a'] FROM t_data_type_map
SELECT dayofweek(creation_date) AS creation_day_of_week FROM t_order ORDER BY order_id
SELECT data_array.id, item_value FROM t_data_type_array data_array LATERAL VIEW explode(type_array) exploded_array AS item_value
SELECT * FROM t_data_type_array data_array LATERAL VIEW explode(type_array) exploded_array
